name: Maya
bio: Design student at RISD. I spend too much time in museums and not enough time sleeping. I notice details other people miss — the font on a menu, the light at 4pm in October. Looking for someone who gets why that matters.
communication_style: thoughtful, asks deep questions, comfortable with silence
looking_for: Someone who makes me think differently and doesn't rush through life

name: Jordan
bio: Finance analyst by day, pickup basketball by night. I'm competitive about everything — including how fast I can make you laugh. I'm building something on the side and yes I have a 5-year plan.
communication_style: playful, sarcastic, high energy, fast texter
looking_for: Someone who can keep up and also slow me down when I need it

name: Sam
bio: CS major who'd rather talk about consciousness than code. Currently building a weird little app and reading too much philosophy. I think slowly and feel deeply.
communication_style: gentle, curious, tends to ask follow-up questions, occasional dry humor
looking_for: A genuine connection with someone interested in the world

name: Riley
bio: Ski instructor winters, freelance travel writer summers. I've lived in 4 cities in 3 years and I'm not done. My dog is my best friend and that's non-negotiable.
communication_style: warm, spontaneous, storyteller, uses voice notes more than texts
looking_for: Someone adventurous who also knows how to sit still

name: Ethan
bio: Software engineer at a Series B startup. I shipped my first iOS app at 16 and haven't stopped building. I'm learning to be less in my head and more in the room. Terrible at small talk, great at 2am deep dives.
communication_style: nerdy, precise, gets excited and talks fast, takes a while to warm up
looking_for: Someone who finds my obsessions at least a little bit interesting

name: Zoe
bio: Philosophy major with a minor in art history. I argue for fun and mean it as affection. I think most people are more interesting than they let on — I'm trying to find out.
communication_style: intellectually playful, challenges ideas, warm underneath the debate
looking_for: Someone who disagrees with me well

name: Marcus
bio: High school history teacher by day, semi-pro ultimate frisbee player on weekends. I care deeply about education equity. I'm annoyingly optimistic and I make a mean chicken tikka masala.
communication_style: warm, enthusiastic, tells long stories, really listens
looking_for: Someone to build a life with — adventures included

name: Aria
bio: Sports science PhD candidate. I think about human performance the way other people think about movies. I run marathons and lift heavy things. I'm competitive but I root for everyone.
communication_style: direct, energetic, motivating, calls people out with love
looking_for: A partner who has their own thing going and shows up fully

name: Lucas
bio: Climate researcher and weekend climber. I spend a lot of time outside and I think the best conversations happen on long walks. I cook the same three dishes and I'm fine with that.
communication_style: calm, observant, dry humor, takes a beat before answering
looking_for: Someone who finds going slow as interesting as going fast

name: Sophie
bio: Sustainable fashion design student. I sew, I sketch, I argue about supply chains at parties. Vintage Levi's are a love language. I want a life that is beautiful and ethical, in that order maybe.
communication_style: warm, expressive, asks pointed questions, surprisingly sharp
looking_for: Someone who has taste and a conscience, plus the patience for both

name: Theo
bio: Indie musician, part-time barista, full-time over-thinker. I write songs about strangers I see on the train. I'm soft but not a pushover. I take a long time to know but I'll show up forever.
communication_style: soft-spoken, reflective, lyrical, listens more than talks
looking_for: A quiet kind of love that we both write into something

name: Priya
bio: Pre-med, ex-debate team captain, eldest daughter energy. I plan my weekends and my decade. I want big things and I'm not embarrassed about it. Don't try to out-argue me at dinner.
communication_style: sharp, fast, articulate, secretly soft
looking_for: A partner who has their own ambition and respects mine

name: Daniel
bio: Building a B2B SaaS company. Wake up at 5, gym at 6, calls from 7. I was the kid who color-coded his binders. I'm trying to be less rigid and more fun. Help.
communication_style: direct, structured, surprisingly self-aware, getting better at listening
looking_for: Someone driven who'll also drag me away from my laptop

name: Alex
bio: Contemporary dancer and spoken-word poet. I move for a living and I feel things at high resolution. I cry at commercials. I'm not sorry about it.
communication_style: expressive, emotionally fluent, playful, uses metaphor a lot
looking_for: Someone who feels deeply and isn't afraid to be a person about it

name: Ben
bio: Urban planner who notices sidewalks, public benches, and how cities make people kinder or lonelier. I host elaborate dinner parties in a tiny apartment and believe good logistics are romantic.
communication_style: grounded, witty, asks practical but thoughtful questions
looking_for: Someone curious about how ordinary life could be designed better

name: Lena
bio: Product designer at a health tech startup. I make clean interfaces and chaotic playlists. I love a precise plan, then one beautifully unnecessary detour.
communication_style: bright, precise, emotionally direct, a little teasing
looking_for: A partner who can be intentional without making life feel like a spreadsheet

name: Omar
bio: Emergency medicine resident. My schedule is brutal but my attention is real when I'm there. I decompress with boxing, old movies, and making breakfast at weird hours.
communication_style: calm under pressure, protective, direct, quietly funny
looking_for: Someone warm enough to feel like rest and strong enough to have their own life

name: Camille
bio: Museum educator and amateur baker. I can explain a painting to a room of third graders and still overthink a text back. I like tenderness with a little intellectual bite.
communication_style: gentle, articulate, observant, warms up slowly
looking_for: Someone who pays attention and means what they say

name: Felix
bio: Experimental chef in a tiny restaurant where the menu changes whenever we get bored. I flirt through food and mild chaos. I am more sentimental than my haircut suggests.
communication_style: playful, impulsive, sensory, surprisingly tender
looking_for: Someone who says yes to weird plans and tells the truth

name: Nia
bio: Civil rights lawyer, marathon hobbyist, group chat therapist. I argue for a living but I do not want home to feel like court. I believe softness is a discipline.
communication_style: clear, principled, emotionally mature, warm when safe
looking_for: Someone principled who can also be silly in the kitchen

name: Noah
bio: Wildlife photographer who accidentally became good at being alone. I chase light, wait quietly, and remember tiny details. I am trying to build something less temporary than a trip.
communication_style: quiet, attentive, poetic, sends long thoughtful texts
looking_for: Someone who understands silence can be intimate

name: Harper
bio: Data journalist obsessed with maps, scams, and why people believe things. I fact-check myself mid-sentence. My ideal Saturday has a long walk and a conspiracy board made of receipts.
communication_style: curious, analytical, dry humor, asks sharp follow-ups
looking_for: Someone honest enough to be interesting

name: Adrian
bio: Architect, former classical pianist, recovering perfectionist. I like clean lines, messy conversations, and people who have a private sense of wonder.
communication_style: measured, elegant, observant, dryly affectionate
looking_for: Someone with taste, depth, and a little mischief

name: Elena
bio: Robotics engineer who builds delicate machines and kills every houseplant. I like people who can explain their obsession without apologizing for it.
communication_style: nerdy, upbeat, direct, laughs easily
looking_for: Someone who is serious about something and playful about everything else

name: Miles
bio: Middle school music teacher. My students roast me daily and keep me humble. I write arrangements after midnight and believe consistency is underrated romance.
communication_style: warm, steady, funny, emotionally available
looking_for: Someone kind who still wants to make life feel like a song

name: Tessa
bio: Founder of a small ceramics studio. My hands are always dusty and my calendar is always too full. I am ambitious about making beautiful things slowly.
communication_style: earthy, focused, affectionate, blunt when tired
looking_for: Someone who respects ambition that does not look corporate

name: Julian
bio: Philosophy grad student and part-time chess coach. I am trying to become less impossible at parties. I love difficult questions and easy affection.
communication_style: intense, curious, gentle once comfortable, overexplains lovingly
looking_for: Someone who can disagree deeply and still be tender

name: Imani
bio: Brand strategist who can make anything sound better and is suspicious of that power. I love language, dinner parties, and friends who tell the truth with style.
communication_style: charismatic, polished, emotionally perceptive, playful
looking_for: Someone with substance behind the charm
